purpose: calibration-only sweep of the frozen proxy's multiplication capability frontier; rows are private, disjoint, never decision data, and support no routing claim
model_scope: qwen2_moe research proxy only; not Agents-A1
prompt_template: What is {a} {op} {b}? Reply with the final number only.

structure_definitions.plain: digits drawn uniformly; leading digit nonzero
structure_definitions.low_carry: every digit of a and b drawn from {0,1,2,3} with leading digits from {1,2,3}; constructively minimizes multiplication and addition carries
structure_definitions.carry_heavy: every digit of a and b drawn from {6,7,8,9}; constructively maximizes carries
structure_definitions.middle_zero: a is three digits with its middle digit forced to 0; b drawn plain
structure_definitions.near_power_of_ten: a drawn uniformly from {101, 102, 998, 999}; b drawn plain two-digit
structure_definitions.x1_cells: b is a single digit drawn from {2,...,9}
structure_definitions.on_unfillable_cell: mark infeasible in the sweep report; never widen

tuple_rejection: reject any (a,b) present in the deterministic tuple sets of the M29, M30, M31, and abandoned M32 manifests, and duplicates within the sweep

frontier_selection_rules.inputs: original greedy pass rates and structural diversity only
frontier_selection_rules.forbidden_inputs: trigger quality, route performance, expert identities, verifier-selected counterfactuals

composition.easy_pick_rule: highest pass rate first, then cell order
composition.hard_pick_rule: lowest pass rate first, then cell order
composition.rounding: floor to multiple of 4; distribute the remainder in cell order

task_count_power_table.rule: choose the smallest N whose expected original failures (sum over cells of allocated count x (1 - sweep pass rate)) is at least 88; if none, choose 288 and record the expected shortfall

splits.assignment: per cell by task index: first half discovery, next quarter validation, final quarter sealed holdout

privacy.public: aggregate cell counts and pass rates only
